title: Inventory Blur
description: Applies the new 1.20.5 menu background blur to Inventories such as chests, the player inventory, etc.
body:
# Inventory Blur A simple mod for Minecraft 1.20.5+ that applies the new menu background blur to Inventories such as chests, the player inventory, etc. This should be compatible with modded inventories that extend Screen. ## Resourcepack Developers This mod adds a new texture for the inventory background, by default this is 16x16 and is tiled across the screen. This texture is located at `assets/eg-inventory-blur/textures/gui/inworld_inventory_background.png` ## License

Inventory Blur by ioblackshaw (a.k.a. Enchanted_Games) is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0

Video content creators may monetise videos including this work provided the license is followed.
